title: Front Office Manager - Dineout - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Dineout - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Dineout are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dineout:
Dineout is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout!
